**Investigation of advanced mindfulness meditation "cessation" experiences using EEG spectral analysis in an intensively sampled case study.** — Neuropsychologia (2023). PMID: 37777153. DOI: 10.1016/j.neuropsychologia.2023.108694. Score: 50. Mindfulness meditation is acontemplative practice informed by Buddhism that targets the development of present-focused awareness and non-judgment of experience. Interest in mindfulness is burgeoning, and it has been shown to be effective in improving mental and physical health in clinical and non-clinical contexts.
